title: Senior Frontend Developer at Narayana Health Digital Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at Narayana Health Digital Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Join the Narayana Health Digital Ventures Solutions family as a Frontend Developer in Kochi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Narayana Health Digital Ventures Solutions:
Narayana Health Digital Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Narayana Health Digital Ventures Solutions!
